title: stipa pennata subsp. eriocaulis
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. eriocaulis, also known as feather grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. It is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in digestion, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Stipa pennata subsp. eriocaulis can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
